positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a whimsical forest guardian—a mythical creature blending elements of a fox, cervidae, and flora. The creature is shown in a regal, upright pose, surrounded by stylized bioluminescent mushrooms and trailing vines. The composition should use strong, clean silhouettes against a deep, midnight blue and emerald green color palette, with pops of contrasting gold and electric cyan for the magical elements. The style should be hyper-detailed yet graphically clean, suitable for a circular print on fabric, with crisp lines, high contrast, and symmetrical elements. Art Deco influence meets nature illustration.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, ugly, disfigured, bad anatomy, out of frame, noise, low detail, signature
